recipe.title: Garlic Shrimp & Couscous Bowl with Roasted Zucchini & Lemon Tahini
steps: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add shrimp in a single layer and cook 3-4 minutes until pink and opaque. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
Prepare couscous per package instructions. Stir in frozen peas and keep warm.
Meanwhile, toss sliced zucchini with olive oil and garlic powder. Roast at 400°F for 20 minutes until golden.
Make the lemon tahini: whisk tahini, lemon juice, water, and garlic until smooth.
Divide couscous among bowls. Top with shrimp, roasted zucchini, and drizzle generously with lemon tahini.
